# ClaireAI — AI Legal Receptionist
> ClaireAI is an AI-powered virtual receptionist built for law firms. It answers every call in 0.8 seconds, qualifies leads, books consultations, and sends retainers — in English or Spanish, 24/7/365.

## Company
- Legal name: ClaireAI, Inc.
- Founded: 2024
- Headquarters: Miami, FL, USA
- Website: https://theclaireai.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/theclaireai

## Product
ClaireAI is a cloud-based AI receptionist that replaces missed calls with signed retainers. Key capabilities:

- 24/7 call answering in 0.8 seconds (no hold music, no voicemail)
- Bilingual intake (English and Spanish)
- Autonomous lead qualification (police reports, fault, medical treatment, statute of limitations)
- Consultation booking directly into attorney calendars
- Retainer automation via DocuSign and PandaDoc
- CRM integration (Clio, Filevine, MyCase, Lawmatics, PracticePanther, Salesforce, HubSpot)
- Conflict checking against existing client database
- Call recording with transcript storage

## Pricing
- Starter: $650/month (solo practitioners, up to 100 calls/month)
- Growth: $1,299/month (small firms, up to 500 calls/month)
- Enterprise: $2,999/month (multi-office firms, unlimited calls)
- No per-minute billing. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.

## Practice Areas
- [Personal Injury](https://theclaireai.com/solutions/personal-injury): Qualifies MVA, slip-and-fall, and premises liability leads. Checks police reports, fault, and medical treatment status.
- [Criminal Defense](https://theclaireai.com/solutions/criminal-defense): 24/7 urgent felony and DUI case routing with instant attorney escalation.
- [Family Law](https://theclaireai.com/solutions/family-law): Sensitive bilingual intake for custody, divorce, and protective order cases.
- [Immigration Law](https://theclaireai.com/solutions/immigration-law): 10+ languages supported. Visa deadline tracking. Cross-timezone consultation booking.

- [Homepage](https://theclaireai.com): Product overview and live demo

- [Blog](https://theclaireai.com/blog): Legal tech insights and analysis

## Integrations
ClaireAI integrates with 66 systems law firms already run — every integration is live, with no per-sync fees. Each link below points to a dedicated integration page with setup steps, sync map, FAQs, and structured data.

### Practice Management Systems
- [Clio Manage](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/clio): Most-used legal CRM; full intake sync over OAuth 2.0
- [MyCase](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/mycase): Native two-way sync with MyCase Advanced tier
- [Filevine](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/filevine): PI-focused; mechanism of injury and treatment fields mapped
- [CASEpeer](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/casepeer): PI-only intake mapped to CASEpeer cases
- [SmartAdvocate](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/smartadvocate): Volume PI firms; full custom-field sync
- [Litify](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/litify): Salesforce-native PI firms
- [Neos (Assembly)](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/neos): Assembly Neos for serious PI volume
- [CloudLex](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/cloudlex): Cloud-native PI matter management
- [PracticePanther](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/practicepanther): 5-minute OAuth setup
- [Smokeball](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/smokeball): Smokeball matters created from call transcript
- [Rocket Matter](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/rocket-matter): Rocket Matter with intake wired in
- [CARET Legal](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/caret-legal): CARET Legal (formerly Zola Suite)
- [CosmoLex](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/cosmolex): CosmoLex with built-in trust accounting
- [Actionstep](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/actionstep): Actionstep for full-suite firms

### Intake CRMs & Lead Management
- [Lawmatics](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/lawmatics): The intake CRM, kept in sync from the first ring
- [HubSpot](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/hubspot): HubSpot CRM with intake calls turning into deals
- [Lead Docket](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/lead-docket): PI-focused intake CRM with API + webhooks
- [Clio Grow](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/clio-grow): Clio's intake CRM
- [Captorra](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/captorra): PI / mass-tort intake
- [Law Ruler](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/law-ruler): PI intake CRM
- [SimplyConvert](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/simplyconvert): PI intake automation

### Payments & E-Signature
- [DocuSign](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/docusign): Retainers signed before the caller dials the next firm
- [LawPay](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/lawpay): Trust-compliant retainer payment in the same call
- [AffiniPay](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/affinipay): Legal-specific payment processor
- [Adobe Sign](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/adobe-sign): E-signature for engagement letters
- [Vinesign](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/vinesign): PI-focused e-signature
- [Gravity Legal](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/gravity-legal): Trust-account-aware payment processing

### Phone Systems & VoIP
- [Telnyx](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/telnyx): SIP-native carrier integration
- [RingCentral](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/ringcentral): RingCentral number forwarding to Claire
- [Dialpad](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/dialpad): Dialpad SIP forwarding
- [Zoom Phone](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/zoom-phone): Zoom Phone forwarding
- [Microsoft Teams Phone](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/ms-teams-phone): Teams calling routed to Claire
- [8x8](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/8x8): 8x8 cloud PBX
- [Vonage](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/vonage): Vonage Business Communications
- [Nextiva](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/nextiva): Nextiva cloud phone
- [OpenPhone](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/openphone): OpenPhone for solo and small firms

### Jail Inmate Phone Systems
- [Securus](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/securus): Securus Tech inmate calls accepted
- [ViaPath (GTL)](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/viapath): GTL / ViaPath inmate call routing
- [IC Solutions](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/ic-solutions): IC Solutions inmate call routing
- [Smart Communications](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/smart-comms): Smart Communications inmate calls

### Calendar & Scheduling
- [Microsoft 365 / Outlook](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/ms365): Outlook calendar booking per attorney
- [Google Workspace](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/google-workspace): Google Calendar booking per attorney
- [Calendly](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/calendly): Calendly event types reused by Claire
- [Acuity Scheduling](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/acuity): Acuity availability honored
- [Microsoft Bookings](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/ms-bookings): Microsoft Bookings appointment writes

### Document Management
- [NetDocuments](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/netdocuments): Per-matter NetDocuments folders auto-created
- [iManage](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/imanage): iManage workspace folders for new matters
- [SharePoint / OneDrive](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/sharepoint): Microsoft SharePoint and OneDrive
- [Google Drive](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/google-drive): Google Drive matter folders
- [Box](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/box): Box workspace folders
- [Dropbox](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/dropbox): Dropbox matter folders

### Court Records & Deadlines
- [PACER](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/pacer): Federal PACER court records lookup
- [CourtListener](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/courtlistener): Free Law Project CourtListener
- [LawToolBox](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/lawtoolbox): Court deadline calculation
- [Docket Alarm](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/docket-alarm): Docket Alarm court tracking

### Accounting
- [QuickBooks Online](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/quickbooks): QuickBooks Online trust-aware posting
- [Xero](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/xero): Xero accounting integration
- [LeanLaw](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/leanlaw): LeanLaw for QuickBooks-using law firms

### Call Tracking & Marketing
- [CallRail](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/callrail): CallRail attribution preserved through Claire
- [WhatConverts](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/whatconverts): WhatConverts source attribution
- [CallTrackingMetrics](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/ctm): CallTrackingMetrics conversion events

### Notifications & Workflow
- [Slack](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/slack): New-lead alerts and on-call escalation
- [Microsoft Teams](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/ms-teams): Teams channel notifications
- [Zapier](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/zapier): 6,000+ app workflows via Zapier
- [Make](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/make): Make.com scenario automation
- [n8n](https://theclaireai.com/integrations/n8n): Self-hosted n8n workflow automation

## Compliance
- SOC 2 Type II certified
- HIPAA compliant
- 256-bit AES encryption
- 99.9% uptime SLA

## FAQ
- Q: How fast does ClaireAI answer calls?
  A: ClaireAI answers every call in 0.8 seconds on the first ring, 24/7/365 — no hold music, no voicemail.

- Q: What languages does ClaireAI support?
  A: ClaireAI supports English and Spanish natively, with 10+ additional languages available for immigration law firms.

- Q: Does ClaireAI integrate with my CRM?
  A: Yes. ClaireAI integrates with Clio, Filevine, MyCase, Lawmatics, PracticePanther, Salesforce, and HubSpot. New contacts, matters, and calendar entries are created automatically.

- Q: Can ClaireAI send retainer agreements?
  A: Yes. ClaireAI checks the statute of limitations, sends retainers via DocuSign or PandaDoc, and follows up — all autonomously while attorneys sleep.

- Q: How much does ClaireAI cost?
  A: Plans start at $650/month with no per-minute billing and no hidden fees. Enterprise plans for multi-office firms start at $2,999/month.

- Q: Is ClaireAI compliant with legal industry standards?
  A: Yes. ClaireAI is SOC 2 Type II certified, HIPAA compliant, uses 256-bit encryption, and maintains a 99.9% uptime SLA.

- Sales: contact@theclaireai.com
- Demo: https://theclaireai.com/contact
